title: Groenenberg French Press I Coffee press I insulated cafetiere I Stainless steel Coffee maker in different sizes 2 cups to 4 cup
features: ✔ FRESH COFFEE TASTE: With the french press coffee maker, you can create a unique coffee taste within minutes - perfect for everyday use. The cafetiere 2 cups and 4 cup includes 3 replacement filter and a manual
✔ DURABLE & ROBUST: Our premium caffettiera is made of stainless steel for excellent coffee taste - just perfect for every coffee lover. 100% plastic-free
✔ EASY CLEANING: Our final press coffee maker can be cleaned quickly and effortlessly, is dishwasher-safe and ensures uncomplicated coffee enjoyment
✔ ELEGANT DESIGN: The stainless steel French press combines timeless design with durability. The coffee press for ground coffee is rust-proof & 100% food-friendly
✔ THERMAL FUNCTION: Our insulated stainless steel cafetiere keeps your coffee warm up to 1 hour
